summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of LedgerAI accounting dashboard enhancements. Successfully tested Reports tab with date filters and 4 views, fully functional Export panel (CSV/Excel/PDF), excellent Recurring tab with monthly outflow tracking, and outstanding Future Cashflow tab with 12-month projections. Critical interactivity issues remain with Activity Analysis view and chart drill-down modals.

critical_bugs.issue: Shows 'No activity data found for selected filters' instead of P&L breakdown per activity with pie charts
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot view activity-based financial analysis despite data being available in other views

critical_bugs.issue: Monthly bars show 'Click on a month to see detailed breakdown' but clicks don't open detail modal
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot drill down into monthly cashflow details as advertised

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown options (3/6/12/24 months) not easily accessible or selectable
ui_bugs.selector: FORECAST dropdown in Future Cashflow tab

integration_issues.issue: Sample data not properly filtered/displayed in Activity Analysis view despite working in Overview

passed_tests: All 4 main navigation tabs present and working (Dashboard, Reports, Recurring, Future Cashflow)
Auth bypass mechanism with 'Continue temporarily without login' button functional
Reports tab date range filters (FROM/TO inputs) present and working
Reports tab Activity dropdown present and functional
All 4 Reports views accessible: Overview, Expense Deep Dive, Activity Analysis, Vendor Analysis
Reports Overview shows P&L summary (₹75,000 income, ₹19,200 expenses, ₹55,800 profit)
Personal Drawings breakdown displays correctly (Rent ₹15,000, Groceries ₹2,500, Entertainment ₹500)
Monthly Expense Trend bar chart renders with sample data
Export functionality fully working - opens panel with CSV, Excel, PDF options
Export shows transaction count ('Export 5 Transactions') accurately
Recurring tab displays Estimated Monthly Outflow (₹90,500) correctly
Recurring tab shows Breakdown by Frequency (Monthly: 3, Quarterly: 0, Yearly: 0)
Confirmed Recurring expenses list shows Netflix, Landlord, Company with amounts and frequencies
Recurring expenses show next due dates and recurrence types properly
Future Cashflow tab displays Total Projected (₹1,86,000) for 12 months
Future Cashflow shows Average Monthly Outflow (₹15,500) calculation
Forecast period selector shows '12 Months' option correctly
Monthly Projection bar chart displays 12 monthly bars (Mar 26 - Feb 27)
Projected Expenses by Vendor breakdown shows Landlord and Netflix data
Sample data injection via localStorage works correctly across all tabs
Visual design and styling maintained professional appearance
Navigation between all tabs and views functions smoothly

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Core functionality and new features working excellently, but critical interactivity features need fixes

action_item_for_main_agent: PRIORITY FIXES NEEDED: 1) Activity Analysis view shows 'No activity data found' - investigate data filtering logic for activity-based P&L breakdown 2) Implement missing drill-down modal functionality for Future Cashflow monthly bars (shows click instruction but no modal opens) 3) Fix chart interaction event handlers across Reports views 4) Improve Forecast Period Selector dropdown accessibility. NOTE: Export functionality, Recurring tab, and Future Cashflow display are working excellently - focus on interactivity fixes.
